---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?

## Proposed Solution

What would you like to see? A new analysis lens, data source, output adapter, config knob…?

## Alternatives

Anything you've tried or considered.

## Additional Context

Links, examples, or references. If you'd be willing to implement it, say so — see
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [docs/EXTENDING.md](../../docs/EXTENDING.md).
